source.authority: Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority and Government of the Virgin Islands
source.scope: Official-source-backed no-PIT scopes for Saudi employment income and British Virgin Islands personal income tax, with business-income and payroll-tax boundaries preserved.

SA.notes: Employment remuneration outside taxable business, permanent-establishment and other Saudi-source activity.

register.coverageSummary: Employment remuneration outside taxable business and other Saudi-source activity.

VG.notes: Personal income tax only; British Virgin Islands payroll tax on remuneration remains outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Personal income tax result; payroll tax, social contributions and other taxes remain separate.
